name: World Legacy's Mind Meld
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>星</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>物</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぶつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>交</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>心</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's monster activates its effect while you control a "Krawler" monster: The activated effect becomes "return 1 face-up monster your opponent controls to the hand". You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Link Monster on the field; Special Summon 1 "Krawler" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY to your zone the target points to, in face-down Defense Position. You can only use 1 "World Legacy's Mind Meld" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: When an opponent's monster activates its effect while you control a "Krawler" monster: The activated effect becomes "return 1 face-up monster your opponent controls to the hand". You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 Link Monster on the field; Special Summon 1 "Krawler" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY to your zone the target points to, in face-down Defense Position. You can only use 1 "World Legacy's Mind Meld" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
